calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-28-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-28-2005 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Michael Rossoff, Esq. for Plaintiff: Joan Deal.
Defendants: Linda Price, present in pro per.
Parties reached a settlement by stipulation, terms of the settlement were read into the record as follows: Plaintiff is entitled to a judgment against the defendants for restitution and possession of the premises of the property located at: 1715 Quesada, San Francisco, CA.
Defendants to vacate the premises on April 15, 2005, locks will be changed on March 8, 2005, and Plaintiff will waive all back rent, damages and within 5 days to pay the defendant the sum of $750.00, and to dismiss with prejudice.
If Defendants fail to vacate, Plaintiff will be entitled to entry of Judgment against Defendants and damages, fees and costs. Any items left in the premises will be disposed of, forfeiture of the rental agreement, each party waives claim against the other, no one else occupying the premises who claims a right to possession.
All parties agreed to the settlement in open court.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-24-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: MICHAEL S. ROSSOFF FOR PLAINTIFF JOAN C. DEAL, WHO IS ALSO PRESENT
DEFENDANT LINDA PRICE IN PRO PER

THIS CAUSE CAME ON REGULARLY FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE THIS DAY. ALL PARTIES WERE PRESENT AS INDICATED ABOVE. SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS WERE HELD. CASE DID NOT SETTLE. TRIAL DATE REMAINS.

JPT MARTE BASSI, CLERK CLARK BANAYAD, NOT REPORTED (218)
